title: Marketplace Manager - Plum Holdings Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Plum Holdings Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Plum Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Plum Holdings Services:
Plum Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum Holdings Services!
